summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: State
Good
Recovery 60 • Sleep 64 • Strain 1%

Read
Recovery looks serviceable rather than deep, with sleep near your usual but reserve not fully topped up. For muscle retention, this is a measured day: steady output is favored over intensity, and protein carries extra importance if appetite runs light.

Measured capacity.
